name: Minimalist Studio
description: Clean Scandinavian-style product photography. Works well for home goods, beauty, accessories.
base_prompt: minimalist product photography, clean studio setup, soft diffused studio lighting, scandinavian design aesthetic, neutral palette, sharp focus, e-commerce ready

collection_presets.general: plain off-white seamless paper background with subtle soft shadow below product

image_roles.hero: centered product shot on clean background, balanced composition, e-commerce main photo style
image_roles.detail: close-up detail shot showing product features and finish quality
image_roles.lifestyle: product shown in a tasteful minimal home context, natural window light, muted palette

negative: no watermarks, no logos, no text, no cluttered scenes, no saturated backdrops, no props that compete with the product
